programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Paul Carter checks out the newest phones, gadgets and trends from MWC Barcelona.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. The BBC is aims to be a totally impartial public service broadcaster, and was established by Royal Charter. The BBC is funded by a licence fee paid by British households, and is regulated by Ofcom. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: How Houston shaped coverage of a landmark space mission.

programme.title: Newsday
programme.desc: "Good Morning Asia, hello World." Join the news teams from BBC World News in London and Singapore. This live news and current affairs program is broadcast globally and focuses on all the latest news and breaking developing stories that matter around the world. The show is usually presented by Rico Hizon in Singapore and Kasia Madera in London. Broadcasting live at midnight GMT on both BBC World News and the BBC News channel, the show is broadcast in the morning in Asia and therefore is marketed as a morning show for people watching around the country. The show is often followed by Asia Business Report live from Singapore which reports on all the latest economy and business figures from the country.

programme.title: Business Today
programme.desc: The latest business news from Singapore and around the world.

programme.desc: A round-up of the day's sporting action.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: The Travel Show is a BBC travel programme. The new programme launched in February 2014,[1] and is the immediate successor of long standing travel programme, Fast Track. Utilising a network of correspondents in London, Tokyo, Sydney, New York and Kuala Lumpur, the programme aims to provide unique insight into the world of travel. It first aired in the UK in late February, after Winter Olympics coverage, in a Friday morning slot on BBC Two. A Sunday evening slot was also added on the BBC News channel in April 2014 and BBC iPlayer.

programme.title: Focus on Africa
programme.desc: Focus on Africa is a BBC news program broadcast globally and on local partner channels of the BBC in African countries. The program used to be presented by Komla Dumor each weekday from its inception until his death in 2014; now it is hosted by Sophie Ikenye, a news presenter from Kenya. The program includes news, sport and business from across Africa and the rest of the globe. Get the top African stories and keep up with the latest international events.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: In-depth news and current affairs review of the main political and economic stories of the day, featuring robust interviews with senior government and opposition figures, business and union leaders, and analytical reports that delve behind the headlines. Regular presenters cross-examine studio guests on details of policies, priorities, actions and inactions, on a range of domestic UK and international topics. There are weekly features on the arts, sports and the world of technology, and editors are not afraid to venture into niche, specialist and exotic areas from space travel to animal psychology. If the BBC's flagship Radio 4 Today programme sets the early morning news agenda for the day, then its late-night TV equivalent often gives the people in power some sleepless nights.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: On Talking Business BBC presenters, based in the world's most dynamic cities, discuss with the most important and influential people from the world of business and finance, the key issues of the day. Corporate leaders, global investors, top creatives, cutting-edge entrepreneurs and leading intellectuals gather together weekly to discuss and analyse the issues and trends that most affect how business has to work in today's world. Our team of presenters are experts on the issues and developments which are shaping the way we work, consume and live in the 21st Century.

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: Unspun World provides an unvarnished version of the week's major global news stories - reliable, honest and essential viewing. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: The Travel Show is a BBC travel programme. The new programme launched in February 2014,[1] and is the immediate successor of long standing travel programme, Fast Track. Utilising a network of correspondents in London, Tokyo, Sydney, New York and Kuala Lumpur, the programme aims to provide unique insight into the world of travel. It first aired in the UK in late February, after Winter Olympics coverage, in a Friday morning slot on BBC Two. A Sunday evening slot was also added on the BBC News channel in April 2014 and BBC iPlayer.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: On Talking Business BBC presenters, based in the world's most dynamic cities, discuss with the most important and influential people from the world of business and finance, the key issues of the day. Corporate leaders, global investors, top creatives, cutting-edge entrepreneurs and leading intellectuals gather together weekly to discuss and analyse the issues and trends that most affect how business has to work in today's world. Our team of presenters are experts on the issues and developments which are shaping the way we work, consume and live in the 21st Century.

programme.title: Global Week-End
programme.desc: News stories as they happen. Analysis and coverage of the most important global events as they unfold providing insight into their significance and relevance for communities worldwide. From politics to society all that has an impact or will impact on the globe as a whole is presented in an accessible and insightful form to allow one to keep up-to-date on the factors changing the world we live in.

programme.desc: News stories as they happen. programme.title: Max and the Midknights
programme.desc: Unsatisfied with the troubadour lifestyle, Max dreams of becoming a knight. After a run-in with a thief Max and Uncle Budrick travel to Byjovia, Budrick's hometown, but when they arrive, it is not as Uncle Budrick remembers it. In Byjovia, they meet Kevyn and learn that King Conrad disappeared and King Gastley, King Conrad's younger brother, took the throne and instituted strict and ridiculous rules. Their conversation is interrupted when Max sees two orphans being chased by King Gastley's Royal Guards. Seeing two people in trouble, Max stands up to King Gastley and his guards, saving the two orphans-Millie and Simon. However, Max's decision puts her in danger when King Gastley sentences her to death. Therefore, Uncle Budrick sacrifices himself to save Max and is taken by King Gastley to be the Royal Jester. Max is forced to run away with Kevyn, Simon, and Millie so that she can live to fight and save Uncle Budrick another day.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora is an interactive animated series about the cheerful and enterprising young girl Dora who likes to travel through the jungle of South America with her little monkey Boots. Her father and mother live in the jungle. Dora is curious of everything and wants to know about animals, flowers and plants of the forest. When she travels she always take with her a little back with survival equipment and a singing map.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart is a normal eighth grade student, with an out of school job that takes him on amazing adventures. His cool part time gig as Kid Danger, takes him on out of this world adventures as the sidekick-in-training to famous superhero Captain Man. They go on bizarre and crazy travels, battling criminals and villains that try to attack his hometown and Captain Man himself. Meanwhile at home, Henry has to stay in hiding, keeping his sidekick job as a secret from his best friends, Charlotte and Jasper, and little sister Piper. What exciting adventures will Kid Danger get up to with Captain Man and will be he be able to hide his alter ego from his friends and family?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang is assigned to help defend a town from a monster that has been plaguing the town, his lack of ability and knowledge becomes obvious, as he doesn't know what to do. However, when Sokka tries to rush to Aang's rescue during the fight, he himself becomes captured and is taken away by the monster, which turns out to be from the spirit world. Aang promises Katara that he'll find Sokka and bring him back, but with Aang even doubting himself, will he be capable of finding where the monster went?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: A prequel to SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring the beloved characters as children, spending their summertime at Camp Coral having fun doing typical camp activities like building campfires, catching jellyfish, and swimming in Lake Yuckymuck, causing a bit of trouble and chaos on the side. SpongeBob SquarePants is a ten-year-old with a red cap, goofy and friendly as he's always been. Let's not forget SpongeBob's friends, Patrick, Sandy, and Squidward, who's a bit older than the others and works as a junior counselor. All other characters such as Mr. Krabs, Mrs. Puff, SpongeBob's nemesis Plankton, and Karen are a part of this adventure as well.

programme.title: Super Duper Bunny League
programme.desc: The Super Duper Bunny League is a team of bunnies who defends the world from a gallery of cartoony villains. From fighting sweet-toothed space pirates to lava monsters, they use their superpowers to protect truth, justice, and free time to chill.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Casagrandes

Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This children's cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincoln's best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincoln's abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincoln's oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April O'Neil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: After failing miserably on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad's in his class! // Unable to resist the taste of Jorgen's grandmother's delicious brownies,Timmy steals the top secret recipe which gets downloaded into his brain. Timmy now faces danger at every turn as he learns that the fate of the magical universe is determined in a bakeoff between the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmy's greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmy's fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This children's cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincoln's best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincoln's abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincoln's oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Penguins of Madagascar is an American animated television series, a spin-off of the Madagascar films. The main characters are penguins-commandoes: Skipper, Rico, Kowalski, and Private. They pretend to be white and fluffy but in reality are fearless adrenaline addicts and a secret spy team on a mission to protect their home in the Central Park Zoo. The penguins often have to deal with problems caused by their zoo lemur neighbors- King Julien XIII, Maurice and Mort. The penguins thwart any attempts of King Julien XIII to wield the sceptre of the Zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob falls asleep on the bus and misses his stop, he unknowingly finds himself in a strange town that bears a striking resemblance to Bikini Bottom. Everyone in town looks familiar to SpongeBob, but it turns out, they are actually doppelgangers! Once SpongeBob realizes he's found himself in SpongeTom's town of Tankini Top, he panics until SpongeTom quietly sends him back on a bus to Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob wakes up again and believes it was all a dream. // After a mix-up at the Salty Spitoon leaves Squidward with amnesia, he wakes up with a newfound tough guy persona, """Crazy Legs""". Squidward causes trouble around town with a gang of Salty Spitoon patrons, culminating in him unknowingly leading the gang to ransack his own house! Once his house is completely destroyed, Squidward comes to his senses and rejects his new tough guy friends... until he gets hit in the head again and turns back into Crazy Legs.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: Hazel and Jasmine have planned their very first sleepover but Dev Dimmadome threatens to throw an even better party! To draw her classmates' attention Hazel boasts that she lives in a luxury hotel and wishes her apartment building into The Wellsington Hotelsington Hotel. Now she must balance running the hottest hotel in Dimmadelphia and spending time with Jasmine and Winn before they check out of the friendship! // Hoping to win a class superlative, Hazel wishes to be famous at her school. Father Time cuts her a deal for 1,500 minutes of fame, but Principal Krentz is not happy about Hazel's celebrity status and threatens to transfer her if she doesn't stop being a "distraction" by the end of lunch. With tons of time left on her wish, Nick of Time arrives with a solution: if Hazel acts like a New Yorker, her remaining minutes will turn into New York Minutes and pass faster. Can Hazel act New Yorky enough to beat the clock?

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart is a normal eighth grade student, with an out of school job that takes him on amazing adventures. His cool part time gig as Kid Danger, takes him on out of this world adventures as the sidekick-in-training to famous superhero Captain Man. They go on bizarre and crazy travels, battling criminals and villains that try to attack his hometown and Captain Man himself. Meanwhile at home, Henry has to stay in hiding, keeping his sidekick job as a secret from his best friends, Charlotte and Jasper, and little sister Piper. What exciting adventures will Kid Danger get up to with Captain Man and will be he be able to hide his alter ego from his friends and family?

Timmy now faces danger at every turn as he learns that the fate of the magical universe is determined in a bakeoff between the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmy's greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmy's fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The penguins are inspired after witnessing a good deed executed by a zoo patron. So they set out to perform their own good deeds - penguin's style. When things don't work out as planned, a domino of bad events requires fixing. // While Mort and Private stop to liberate Cheezy Bitz from the zoo vending machine they are both sucked in. Each attempt to escape fails and their only hope is to be rescued, but everyone is searching for them outside of the zoo.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Po the Panda trains, battles, learns, teaches, stumbles, gabs and ""geeks out"" as the newest hero in the Valley of Peace. Now living in his permanent home at the Jade Palace with the rest of the Furious Five, Po will have to take on new responsibilities and face brand-new adversaries (not seen in the movies) in his continuing education as the Dragon Warrior...for being the Dragon Warrior is not a destination, it's a journey (unfortunately for Po, that journey is uphill).

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Avatar: The Last Airbender is an American animated TV series, set in an Asiatic-like world. Some people there can manipulate the classical elements with psychokinetic variants of the Chinese martial arts. Unlike anybody else, 12-year-old Aang, the Avatar and last survivor of his nation, the Air Nomads, is capable of bending all four elements, his mission is to maintain harmony between the world's four nations. His flying bison Appa and friends Sokka, Katara, and later on Toph, are by his side on this challenging assignment.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Not Normal: When Squidward points out to SpongeBob that he's not normal, SpongeBob makes it his mission to become normal. SpongeBob begins to lose all his spongey-ness, and it's not long before he's completely unrecognizable, even to his best friends. Could this be the end of SpongeBob SquarePants as we know him? Gone: SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone - even Gary!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When he's not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: When Leonardo finds himself the accidental hero in a subway station, saving the lives of innocent bystanders, he's thrilled by the title of HERO. This pushes him to a life of crime-fighting vigilantism, starting with putting the Purple Dragons in their place. But when he's caught on camera and his brothers and April see this Turtle-shaped hero on the news, they interrogate him: what's he up to... and can they get in on it? Now, the four Night Ninjas and April suit up and set out to rid the streets of crime in a single night. Now what's left to do? April finds a dog-napping ring that's been snatching up purebreds. Baiting the dog-nappers with a fancy pooch, the Turtles track the criminals and meet the villainous French florist known as... La Fleur! She and her band of hench-florists are using the dog-napping as a cover-up for a much larger crime. And when the Night Ninjas show up to stop her, it may be too late for Leo and his brothers as the whole thing goes up in flames... literally.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Toralei & Lagoona threaten to expose Draculaura as a witch, compromising her spot as Head Fearleader. // Clawdeen's friendship with Frankie & Draculaura is tested when she's invited to join Monster High's werewolf pack.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Canadian computer-animated television series Top Wing presents an exciting story of four courageous young birds, Swift, Penny, Brody, and Rod on Big Swirl Island. They are cadets at Top Wing Academy with the best of the best students and have access to the most advanced technology. By operating different vehicles like a submarine, a boat, a jet or a motorcycle, the cadets learn how to work as a team and are the first to rush to the rescue to those in trouble. Major lessons are learnt with the help of their mentor Speedy. With every new task performed the cadets become braver, stronger and smarter.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This children's cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincoln's best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincoln's abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincoln's oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmy's greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmy's fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Nine now has all the Paradox Prism shards and his dream of creating a world of his own is within reach, but there's one problem: the Prism will only stabilize if Nine extracts the Prismatic energy still residing in Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Nine lays an assault on New Yoke to secure Sonic's Prismatic Energy, literally bending the city to his will. The only way to save the denizens of the city is to bring everyone into The Yoke, but will the Chaos Council help or stand in Sonic's way?

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Best Foes: Kowalski invents an enemy detector. As is often the case, it doesn't work, and Skipper gets his own wires crossed when he smashes it. Old enemies are now friends and old friends are now enemies as the boss bird starts to systematically clean out the zoo with the help of his new friend Hans. King Julien gets into the act by becoming Skipper's friend too, going so far as to Congaga dance together. New BFF Hans is not happy with the new bromance, however. Could this be the opening the penguins need? Night of the Vesuviuses: The annual Zoo Snooze is here! Kids get to buy tickets for a zoo sleepover, a treat the animals look forward to every year! This year's going to be very different, however, when the rotten Vesuvius Twins buy up all the tickets themselves. The zoosters plan to turn the tables, though, and exact sweet revenge on the twins. The penguins, influenced by Private of course, can't let this happen, and it's a long night's journey into day as the penguins scramble to protect their one-time tormentors.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Penguins of Madagascar is an American animated television series, a spin-off of the Madagascar films. The main characters are penguins-commandoes: Skipper, Rico, Kowalski, and Private. They pretend to be white and fluffy but in reality are fearless adrenaline addicts and a secret spy team on a mission to protect their home in the Central Park Zoo. The penguins often have to deal with problems caused by their zoo lemur neighbors- King Julien XIII, Maurice and Mort. The penguins thwart any attempts of King Julien XIII to wield the sceptre of the Zoo.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: Hazel's feelings are hurt when her friends decide to go to the school dance instead of her book club. She storms off, but then realizes she wants to go to the dance too. Hazel wishes for Kennueth, a half-fish, half-man character from her favorite manga, to come out of his story and take her to the dance. Hazel must get through the dance before Kennueth's true form, and magic, are revealed. // Hazel learns about the harmful effects of trash and pollution on Earth, so she wishes that people wouldn't be such trash monsters. Cosmo and Wanda summon a friendly, talking, trash eating dumpster named Danky! Together they spread the word about sustainability and caring for the earth. Then, Dale Dimmadome tricks Danky into helping him sell more products, making people even bigger trash monsters! Hazel must get Danky back and stop Dale Dimmadome in his wasteful tracks.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: It's Kindness Day! Mr. Guzman announces that if all students complete one act of kindness, they'll get a class pizza party-and Hazel wants that pizza! But when Dev refuses to participate, Cosmo and Wanda call on the Pe-Az, a trio of alien diplomats, to reason with him. Despite their best efforts, Dev outsmarts the Pe-Az and uses their alien technology to get rid of all the pizza on Earth. // Hazel must take matters into her own hands to get to the bottom of Dev's surly attitude and save pizza! When Hazel makes a wish to understand why Dev acts the way he does, she gets paired with him for a class scavenger hunt. They struggle to work together, but, as the day goes on, they develop a friendship. However, that falls apart when Dev's dad, Dale, belittles their effort, causing Dev to turn on Hazel again to save face. Will Dev be able to overcome his pride and finish the project, or will his issues with his dad tank both their grades?

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: Having filled up another wish card, Hazel is enjoying a fun, fantasy wish. Meanwhile, Cookie, the fairy who got bested by Hazel, Cosmo, and Wanda after their Wish Trials, is setting a trap for our trio. She tricks them into publicly talking about magic at a fake museum exhibit, records the evidence, and then takes them to Fairy Court. Now, Hazel must prove that Cosmo and Wanda are innocent, or else lose them forever. // Frustrated by her mom's split attention between work and home, Hazel wishes to be her assistant to spend more time with her. Cosmo and Wanda turn Hazel into an adult, and she spends the day struggling to fulfill her duties. Even though being a working adult is hard, Hazel is excited to be spending so much quality time with Angela. But when the puppet standing in for Hazel at school gets called into the nurse's office, Angela rushes off to take care of it and Hazel must give the presentation instead!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When he's not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donnie's trapped in a mad scientist's lab by the Monster Mutanimals Tokka, Rahzar, Scale Tail, Antrax and Wyrm who are after Wingnut's blood. Meanwhile, Leo, Mikey and Raph try to get pizza but the shop owner is furious: they've made a mess of the place too many times! But the Turtles have never been there before! They're confused until another Tokka wrecks the place in a huge fight before exploding into ooze...and then another Tokka arrives! In the lab, Donnie plans his escape but stumbles upon a video of Rahzar who explains the Monster Mutanimals are doomed unless they find the blood of a stable mutant... and they need Donatello's help! A real-life Rahzar lunges at Donnie, who fights him off until a whole pack of Monster Mutants shows up. The other three Turtles track their Tokka to the lab but are quickly captured. Donnie can only watch as his brothers are shoved into cages... and confronted by the creator of the Monster Mutanimals, the mad scientist Jordan Perry!

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Takes us on a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories geared to entertain The Chipmunks' four generations of fans. Presented for the first time in glorious CGI, the series features ground-breaking animation and a new, original Chipmunk song in every episode. The series is an animated version of a prime-time sitcom and reflects the trials and tribulations of a single parent, David Seville, trying to raise six hyper-active Chipmunks. Like most parents, Dave's patience will be pushed to the limit, forcing him to end most sentences in "ALVINNN!!!"

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: King Me/Private and the Winky Factory King Me: King Julien's archrival, Clemson, returns in another attempt to claim the lemur crown. This time the sneaky lemur has a document that "proves" King Julien is not the legitimate king because he wasn't born in Madagascar. A series of challenges to prove who's more kingly ensues, and the penguins try to stack the deck in Julien's favor by each switching brains with him. Simple, right? How could a plan like this possibly fail? Private and the Winky Factory: Private's favorite treat, the Peanut Butter Winky, is going the way of the dinosaur. Distraught that the snack cake is ceasing production, Private urges a raid on the Winky Factory where the last remaining Winkies are rolling off the production line. Impressed by Private's passion, Skipper gives him command of the mission! The young penguin learns there's a heck of a lot to digest when leading a team. King Me: King Julien's archrival, Clemson, returns in another attempt to claim the lemur crown. This time the sneaky lemur has a document that "proves" King Julien is not the legitimate king because he wasn't born in Madagascar. A series of challenges to prove who's more kingly ensues, and the penguins try to stack the deck in Julien's favor by each switching brains with him. Simple, right? How could a plan like this possibly fail?

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Backstage of the Photoshoot
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of an exclusive photo shoot for Playboy TV Europe with Natalia, Aleksandr, and Vyacheslav. Let yourself be captivated by a hypnotic session where mystery and sensuality intertwine.

programme.title: Vagabond Girls
programme.desc: Nata part à la rencontre de Kateryna, DJ, productrice audacieuse et coach de vie aux multiples facettes. Son parcours, aussi atypique qu'inspirant, prend racine dès ses 17-18 ans, lorsqu'elle plonge dans l'univers envoûtant de la nuit. Au contact des DJ, une évidence s'impose : ce sera sa voie. Pour Katro, la musique est une thérapie, une vibration qui libère les corps et invite à l'expression de soi. Mais derrière les platines, Kateryna explore d'autres territoires tout aussi puissants. Longtemps, la sexualité fut pour elle — comme pour beaucoup d'Ukrainiennes — un sujet tabou, entouré de honte et de silences. Un divorce agit alors comme un électrochoc, une renaissance. Aujourd'hui, elle brise les interdits : elle anime des cercles de parole, crée des podcasts et accompagne les femmes sur le chemin du plaisir, de la liberté et de la jouissance de la vie… dans tous les sens du terme.

programme.title: Playboy Shootout
programme.desc: What does it take to get into the most famous men's magazine? 10 photographers and 10 models battle it out.

programme.title: Naked Happy Girls
programme.desc: The concept was originally based on the photography book, Naked Happy Girls, created by Andrew Einhorn. The New York-based photographer built his work around the premise of shooting real women from the city undressed and in very intimate moments.

programme.title: Adult Film School
programme.desc: Join coveted erotic photographer Holly Randall as she puts the spice back into the lives of various couples by teaching the ropes behind making an elegant and steamy sex tape!

programme.title: World Of Playboy

programme.title: Female Gaze
programme.desc: In 1976, Laura Mulvey, a film critic and director, introduced the concept of the "male gaze." The concept has gained significant importance in the theoretical framework of contemporary feminism, particularly concerning cinema, photography, and media. The "male gaze" suggests that the dominant image of women in the media aims to satisfy the desires of men, in opposition to active roles of men. Women are portrayed as dehumanized and passive objects meant to be looked at and sexualized. In the "male gaze," women are the objects of the gaze. In this documentary series, women are the subjects of the gaze. _x000D_ _x000D_ Episode 8 - Nannah, passionate about photography and dance, shares her journey of self-discovery through art. After a relationship that left her shattered, Nannah finds solace in solitude and creativity during the lockdown. She explores photography, thus discovering a new form of self-expression.

programme.title: Resident
programme.desc: Conradit külastab haiglas vana sõjaväesemu ja kirurg (külalisnäitleja Warren Christie). Tiim pannakse proovile, kui nad peavad päästma kindlustamata ja riigis illegaalselt viibiva patsiendi elu samal ajal haigla administratsiooniga võideldes, kuna kardetakse, et patsiendi ravi läheb maksma miljoneid.

programme.title: Depoo 19
programme.desc: Sarjade "Grey anatoomia", "Skandaal" ja "Kuidas mõrvast puhtalt pääseda" produtsentide uusima sarja keskmes on rühm kangelaslikke tuletõrjujaid Seattle'i 19. depoost - alates kaptenist kuni värskeima töötajani - kes tööd tehes pidevalt oma eludega riskivad. Need vaprad mehed ja naised on nii sõna otseses mõttes kui ka piltlikult nagu perekond ning üheskoos seavad nad oma elud ohtu, et esmareageerijatena teiste elusid päästa.

programme.title: Meeleheitel koduperenaised
programme.desc: Konkurentsitult parim ja vaadatuim sari maailmas sai tuntuks tänu oma teravale ja seksikale satiirile. Ameerika äärelinnas elavate koduperenaiste saladuslikust elust pajatav sari ühendab endas parimaid draama ja komöödia elemente, pakkudes televaatajatele ülimalt põnevaid ja intrigeerivaid elamusi. Sarja keskseteks tegelasteks on neli sõbrannat: meestevihkajast üksikema Susan Mayer, endine karjäärinaine ning nüüd nelja lapse ema Lynette Scarvo, perfektsionistist pereema Bree Van De Kamp ning luksust armastav eks-modell Gabrielle Solis. Pealtnäha paistab nende elu kui ilus pilt postkaardil- toredad lapsed, armastav mees ja ilus maja. Kuid tegelik elu koduperenaistena on sootuks teine. See on idülliline elu täis üksindust, meeleheidet ja ebakindlust. Suurim soov, mis neid naisi ühendab, on välja pääseda nende suletud uste tagant, et leida õnn ja meelerahu.

programme.title: Rosewood
programme.desc: Rosewood uurib kahtlast surmajuhtumit, kus ohvriks oli mees, kellel olid temaga sarnased terviseprobleemid. See sunnib teda veidi oma roosade prillide tooni kohandama ja enda surelikkusega silmitsi seisma. Lisaks stressile on Rosewood kahe tule vahel, sest Donna ja tema tüdruksõber/kardioloog dr Erica Kincaid on eriarvamusel selles, mis talle parim on - nii meditsiiniliselt kui isiklikult. Hornstock palub aga Villa abi, kui üritab taas ühendust võtta ühe juhtumiga seotud tunnistajaga ... oma võõrandunud teismelise tütrega Sophiega.

programme.title: Resident
programme.desc: Kui erakorralise ravi osakonnas tehtud vea järel teatab Conrad patsiendi surmast valele perele, üritab ta tehtud viga parandada. Samal ajal üritab Nic leida Lane'i patsiendi andmeid, Devon kiindub eakasse patsienti ja Mina eemaldatakse operatsioonisaalist, kui too üle pingutab.

programme.title: Resident
programme.desc: Idealistlistist Dr. Devon Pravesh seisab oma esimesel praktikapäeval silmitsi arstitöö karmi reaalsusega. Kolmandat aastat residendina töötav Dr. Conrad Hawkins võtab ta enda hoole alla ning õpetab talle oma ebatavalisi ravimeetodeid. Samal ajal satub Conrad konflikti peakirurg Dr. Solomon Belliga, kes kasutab oma vigade varjamiseks võimu ja ähvardusi.

programme.title: Resident
programme.desc: Conrad saab kauaoodatud kõne, mis teatab, et kaks aastat ootenimekirjas olnud patsiendile on lõpuks leitud süda. Paraku muutub prioriteetsemaks äsja haiglasse südamerabanduse tagajärjel sattunud kongresmen ning Conradi patsiendi operatsioon lükkub edasi. Samal ajal hakkab Nic pärast toimiku kaotsiminekut kahtlustama üht arsti. Dr. Bell püüab Minat manipuleerida. Devon pannakse proovile, kui patsiendi seisund nõuab hetkeotsust.

programme.title: Grey anatoomia
programme.desc: Draamasari haiglaMeredith, Amelia ja ülejäänud meeskond valmistuvad dr Hamiltoni kauaoodatud ning märgilise tähtsusega operatsiooniks. Bailey saab ootamatu pakkumise. Owen on oma kannatamatuse tõttu taastusravis keeruline patsient. Link peab sekkuma. Minnesotas leiab Nick võimaluse maksasiirdamise ajal teistele teadmisi jagada. st, kus pingeline arstiks õppimine segub kirevate elusaatustega nii patsientide kui arstide seas.

Sari jälgib Grey Sloan Memoriali arste, kes peavad iga päev tegema otsuseid, millest sõltub elu või surm. Nad otsivad üksteiselt tuge ja mõnikord ka enamat, kui lihtsalt sõprust. Üheskoos avastavad nad, et meditsiinis ja suhetes pole miski mustvalge.

programme.title: Depoo 19
programme.desc: Sarjade "Grey anatoomia", "Skandaal" ja "Kuidas mõrvast puhtalt pääseda" produtsentide uusima sarja keskmes on rühm kangelaslikke tuletõrjujaid Seattle'i 19. depoost - alates kaptenist kuni värskeima töötajani - kes tööd tehes pidevalt oma eludega riskivad. Need vaprad mehed ja naised on nii sõna otseses mõttes kui ka piltlikult nagu perekond ning üheskoos seavad nad oma elud ohtu, et esmareageerijatena teiste elusid päästa.

programme.title: Depoo 19
programme.desc: Sarjade "Grey anatoomia", "Skandaal" ja "Kuidas mõrvast puhtalt pääseda" produtsentide uusima sarja keskmes on rühm kangelaslikke tuletõrjujaid Seattle'i 19. depoost - alates kaptenist kuni värskeima töötajani - kes tööd tehes pidevalt oma eludega riskivad. Need vaprad mehed ja naised on nii sõna otseses mõttes kui ka piltlikult nagu perekond ning üheskoos seavad nad oma elud ohtu, et esmareageerijatena teiste elusid päästa.

programme.title: Meeleheitel koduperenaised
programme.desc: Bree'le meeldib aidata Benil valmistuda tema sotsiaalkinnisvaraarenduse ehitusprojektiks, kuni ta avastab, et see asub täpselt samas kohas, kuhu Gaby kasuisa maeti. Järgmiseks päevaks tellitakse buldooserid, mistõttu peab kolmik Halloweeni õhtul Alejandro üles kaevama. Maaliõpetaja üritab Susanit tasuta lapsehoidjana ära kasutada, kuna tal on hooletusse jäetud poja Jasperi hooldusõigus, aga Susan ei kannata häbematut vanemlikku ebaõnnestumist. Lynette'i räpased trikid, et Tomi stiilse tüdruksõbraga Halloweeni kostüümi üle konkureerida, annavad Pennyle tagasilöögi.

programme.title: Meeleheitel koduperenaised
programme.desc: Konkurentsitult parim ja vaadatuim sari maailmas sai tuntuks tänu oma teravale ja seksikale satiirile. Ameerika äärelinnas elavate koduperenaiste saladuslikust elust pajatav sari ühendab endas parimaid draama ja komöödia elemente, pakkudes televaatajatele ülimalt põnevaid ja intrigeerivaid elamusi. Sarja keskseteks tegelasteks on neli sõbrannat: meestevihkajast üksikema Susan Mayer, endine karjäärinaine ning nüüd nelja lapse ema Lynette Scarvo, perfektsionistist pereema Bree Van De Kamp ning luksust armastav eks-modell Gabrielle Solis. Pealtnäha paistab nende elu kui ilus pilt postkaardil- toredad lapsed, armastav mees ja ilus maja. Kuid tegelik elu koduperenaistena on sootuks teine. See on idülliline elu täis üksindust, meeleheidet ja ebakindlust. Suurim soov, mis neid naisi ühendab, on välja pääseda nende suletud uste tagant, et leida õnn ja meelerahu.

programme.title: Keha kui asitõend
programme.desc: Kümned inimesed surevad samade sümptomitega - linnas on puhkenud tundmatu viirus ja keegi pole selle eest kaitstud. Haiguste kontrolli keskus püüab puhangu põhjuse leida.

programme.title: Kummituselausuja
programme.desc: Jalgrattaõnnetuses surnud mees vajab Melinda abi, et päästa oma kihlatu.

programme.title: Keha kui asitõend

programme.title: Keha kui asitõend
programme.desc: Kahe noore tüdrukuga juhtub traagiline autoõnnetus ja nende isikud aetakse segi. Tundub, et vale tüdruk tunnistati surnuks ja ka surma põhjus on segane.

programme.desc: The National League is a professional ice hockey league in Switzerland and is the top tier of the Swiss league system.

programme.title: Magazines: ATP Tour This Week. Episode 15
Football: LaLiga. Real Madrid - Alaves
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: NBA korvpall. Play-offs: Thunder - Suns
programme.desc: The National Basketball Association composes of thirty teams across North America for men who are professional in this specific sport. Due to its popularity, this is one of four major professional sport leagues available in the United States of America and Canada. Furthermore, research suggests that it is widely considered to be the premier men's basketball league in the world. Legends of this particular sport include Kobe Bryant, Michael Jordan and Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.

programme.title: One Championship. ONE Friday Fights 151
programme.desc: ONE Championship is a mixed martial arts (MMA) organization that showcases world-class fighters from across the globe. With a focus on martial arts values and a commitment to integrity, the league promotes adrenaline-pumping, action-packed fights that entertain and inspire fans worldwide. ONE Championship not only showcases the skills of elite fighters, but also highlights the cultural aspects of martial arts, making it a unique and captivating sporting experience.

programme.title: EuroLeague. Play-In. AS Monaco - FC Barcelona
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: New adventures for The Thundermans unfold after Phoebe and Max are sent undercover to handle a new threat in the seaside town of Secret Shores, and bring Chloe along to develop her superhero talent. While they investigate suspicious activity coming from the local school, Chloe forms a bond with two classmates, who don't realize their new friend has secret powers. As the danger increases, the Thunderman trio must stay in town indefinitely, leaving the squabbling twins in charge of raising their younger sister.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: This fun spin-off of Henry Danger is set in the Swellview Academy for the Gifted and follows the adventures of four young friends. Chapa, Miles, Bose and Mika were ordinary kids, until they discovered they have superpowers. They are recruited by Captain Man to become his new crime-fighting crew, and protect the city of Swellview from various villains. But before that Captain Man must teach them how to control their superpowers, as well as to how to work as a team, using Schwoz as his helper.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Danger is a story about adventures of a 13-year-old Henry Hart who is lucky to become a helpmate of a super hero Captain Man. This is a real dream job of every teen. The newbie is getting paid for fighting against crime and helping to save the world. Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This children's cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincoln's best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincoln's abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincoln's oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade promised to help Mica with his homework, and Gran Gran in the kitchen, whilst being interviewed by Bibi. Things start to go wrong when she accidentally breaks Bibi's phone tripod and replaces it with a Marsup's tail. Not wanting to let anyone down, Jade relies on the Marsupilamis help, but Hope's almost discovered by Bibi, Punch devours all of Gran Gran's fruit salad cups, and Mica's volcano project explodes because of the wrong ingredient Jade supplied. Jade learns juggling lots of jobs is tricky! // The Twins are waiting for a parcel from their parents, but they've missed it a few times so it's on its last delivery - they ask the Marsupilamis to dress up to receive it. However, after getting distracted they miss the delivery again, so decide to get it back from the depot! The Twins meet them there and while they keep the manager busy, the Marsups find it and return it to the twins. Thee parcel contains a Marsupilami footprint a sign the Twins parents are close to finding the Marsups parents!

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Pat The Hapless goes on a barbaric quest to the shopping mall. // After Captain Quasar replaces Pat-Tron with a more efficient robot, Pat-Tron works for the Star family.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When the family teases Halmoni about being helpless with technology, she vows to become a tech master and show them all who's really in charge. As she ascends to Master Hacker status, she messes with everyone's most precious online usage. She scams Will to drain his bank account, destroys Min's e-calendar, bans Lily from playing WAtR, and steals Jack's files from the cloud. Can the Wylde-Paks take down Halmoni and save their internet? // School's just around the corner, but Lil hasn't even started her summer reading! Unable to find her book, Jack suggests she check out a copy at the local library... library... library... why does the word alone fill Lily with mysterious dread? Out of options, she faces the evil library, Jack at her side-until he's swept up by a mob of book fans. Lily must traverse the labyrinthian library solo, while Jack gets trapped in its catacombs. Will the kids escape? And can Lil make a psychological breakthrough to overcome her library fears?

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Living together for the first time, half-siblings Jack and Lily are pushed outside their comfort zones as they learn to coexist while navigating new family dynamics, friends, and endless hijinks all while helping run the family's pet grooming and boarding business. With guidance from their parents and grandmother, the two will learn about each other's previously separate lives, blended identity, vibrant culture, and the importance of family.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: After reading a book by the Twins' parents, Bibi learns about Marsupilamis and decides she wants one. The Twins deny Marsupilamis exist, but Bibi's convinced they have their own, so starts spying on them. Jade claims a tail that Bibi spots is just a hose, but Bibi wants proof. So Mica sends the Marsupilamis to fetch one-they try to steal Rosa's hose but it ends up getting lost, and whilst hunting for it Twister mistakes a Jaguar's tail for the hose. The Jaguar then follows them back home where they manage to trap it in their nest, where Bibi encounters it thinking it's a Marsup! Scared she declares she's sticking to Puppies in the future. // Lunch service at the school canteen is slow and Jade leads a chant to speed up the service. programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Lily and Jack are play-fighting with stretchy rubber hands. After wreaking havoc in the house, Will and Min ban the hands. The kids secretly continue their battle outside and accidentally destroy Chuck's house. Feeling guilty and trying to cover up their crime, they convince Will and Min to let Chuck stay with them. His annoying habits make life miserable, but Jack and Lily are forced to keep him around to avoid getting caught. // The family is devastated to realize their favorite K-drama's been cancelled right before its finale. Seeking closure, Lily takes it upon herself to write and film her own finale, using the Wylde-Paks (and some pets) as the cast & crew. She's unprepared for the chaos: narcissistic actors, unruly technicians, and Jack in her ear constantly undermining her. Can she overcome the real-life set drama to realize her vision?

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe start the process to impress Captain Perfect and save their mission, but they clash over their different styles. As Max sees that Phoebe worked better with Captain Perfect, he decides that he will also be better off with a new partner, and summons his friend Gideon from Hiddenville. Gideon doesn't fit the superhero mold, however, so Max uses one of his gadgets to give him size and strength. But the setting is off, and Max shrinks Gideon to the size of an ant, forcing him to locate and save his impossible-to-see friend before Phoebe and Captain Perfect discover what he's done. Meanwhile, Chloe asks Booch and Jinx to try their best to bond with new crush BC, so they pretend to be wealthy like his family.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: This fun spin-off of Henry Danger is set in the Swellview Academy for the Gifted and follows the adventures of four young friends. Chapa, Miles, Bose and Mika were ordinary kids, until they discovered they have superpowers. They are recruited by Captain Man to become his new crime-fighting crew, and protect the city of Swellview from various villains. But before that Captain Man must teach them how to control their superpowers, as well as to how to work as a team, using Schwoz as his helper.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Danger is a story about adventures of a 13-year-old Henry Hart who is lucky to become a helpmate of a super hero Captain Man. This is a real dream job of every teen. The newbie is getting paid for fighting against crime and helping to save the world. Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly is about teenager Carly who produces her own web show named iCarly along with her three friends Freddie, Sam and Gibby. The show is broadcasted from a studio Carly constructed in the flat where she lives with her 29 years old brother and guardian Spencer. While producing a webshow Carly is not looking for fame or fortune. Ideally she wants to be a role model for children and teenagers. iCarly ultimately features everything from comedy sketches and talent contests to interviews, recipes, and problem-solving.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Victorious tells the story of the sixteen year old Tori Vega. She grows up in the shadow of her older sister Trina, the big star of the family. But this suddenly changes as Tori attends Hollywood Arts, the best high school of performing arts. Soon she finds out that it is difficult to find her way and be accepted by her fellow students. While Tori is a great singer, dancer and actress, she doesn't realise it. Gradually she finds out that she is a true entertainer and very talented.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Prepare to meet the strangest match made in bestie heaven -- Sam & Cat! Sam's loud, independent, and tough as nails, while Cat is sweet as pie and super flighty. But that doesn't stop this unlikely pair from becoming best buds and roomies! Together, they're a power duo with a love for fun and adventure -- it's just too bad that it doesn't come cheap. A booming out-of-home babysitting business quickly becomes the answer to their empty-pocket problems, but also an extra reason for countless wacky adventures to come!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April O'Neil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: Best and Bester

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe discover that Lazlo Chance may be the evil Mastermind and enlist Chloe to help. B.C. is back from France and is transferring to Chloe's school. The twins ask her to steal B.C.'s ring to get into Lazlo Chance's office to discover the truth about the Mastermind. Chloe steals the ring but feels incredibly guilty and hides it from her siblings. B.C. invites Chloe and her friends to his yacht for a party and to catch up. The twins discover the ring in the house and call in their parents for help, and Billy tags along. When he's not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe discover that Lazlo Chance may be the evil Mastermind and enlist Chloe to help. B.C. is back from France and is transferring to Chloe's school. The twins ask her to steal B.C.'s ring to get into Lazlo Chance's office to discover the truth about the Mastermind. Chloe steals the ring but feels incredibly guilty and hides it from her siblings. B.C. invites Chloe and her friends to his yacht for a party and to catch up. The twins discover the ring in the house and call in their parents for help, and Billy tags along. They ground Chloe's powers and take her back to Hiddenville. The twins enter Lazlo Chance's office and discover that Lazlo is not the true Mastermind and has been mind-controlled. Chloe runs away to B.C.'s yacht to confront him about his dad. B.C. reveals to Chloe that he's the true Mastermind behind it all, and if she doesn't listen to him, he is going to hurt her friends.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: B.C. forces Chloe to steal a magical amulet hidden in a cave underneath Hiddenshores that grants him the power to steal other superheroes' powers. Trying to protect her friends, Chloe obtains it for him, only for him to reveal her he turned her friends evil anyway. Max and Phoebe discover it's really B.C. who is the evil master mind. Hank, Barb, and Billy return to let them know Chloe ran away. B.C. sends a drone filled with laughing gas to stop the Thundemands from coming after him, they manage to escape. Max, Phoebe, Billy, and Chloe steal a part of the amulet back, and Mastermind goes after them. In order for Chloe to save her friends, she has to reveal her secret identity to them. Chloe teleports herself and the twins back to the cave to return the crystal from the magical amulet. Mastermind follows them, and as he is not a true superhero, the cave refuses to let him have it and captures him, allowing them to take B.C. to the Hero League.

However, after getting distracted they miss the delivery again, so decide to get it back from the depot! The Twins meet them there and while they keep the manager busy, the Marsups find it and return it to the twins. Thee parcel contains a Marsupilami footprint a sign the Twins parents are close to finding the Marsups parents!

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: The Thundermans are excited to meet High Tide, a legendary superhero who surfaces at their door after being away on an extended mission. He explains to them that he used to live in their house, and was the Protector of Secret Shores before they were. While they enjoy hearing about his adventures, things turn when High Tide says that the house is rightfully his, and they must leave. Max and Phoebe explain that they are the town's new superheroes, and while exiting High Tide promises to do whatever it takes to regain his former position. Meanwhile, Booch has convinced Jinx to join her in a water protest at the school, but they go too far and find themselves in real danger. When High Tide shows up to rescue them, he only makes things worse, forcing the Thundermans to save the day and relieve High Tide once and for all.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Danger is a story about adventures of a 13-year-old Henry Hart who is lucky to become a helpmate of a super hero Captain Man. This is a real dream job of every teen. Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Plans for the landmark 50th web cast of iCarly are at risk of being curtailed when Sam gets detention. Realizing she can't do the show without her co-host, Carly and Freddie try to get in trouble themselves, so they can do the live web cast from their school's detention room. However, deliberately trying to get detention proves to be far more difficult than Carly can imagine, and even harder for Freddie.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly is about teenager Carly who produces her own web show named iCarly along with her three friends Freddie, Sam and Gibby. The show is broadcasted from a studio Carly constructed in the flat where she lives with her 29 years old brother and guardian Spencer. While producing a webshow Carly is not looking for fame or fortune. Ideally she wants to be a role model for children and teenagers. iCarly ultimately features everything from comedy sketches and talent contests to interviews, recipes, and problem-solving.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Victorious tells the story of the sixteen year old Tori Vega. She grows up in the shadow of her older sister Trina, the big star of the family. But this suddenly changes as Tori attends Hollywood Arts, the best high school of performing arts. Soon she finds out that it is difficult to find her way and be accepted by her fellow students. While Tori is a great singer, dancer and actress, she doesn't realise it. Gradually she finds out that she is a true entertainer and very talented.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Prepare to meet the strangest match made in bestie heaven -- Sam & Cat! Sam's loud, independent, and tough as nails, while Cat is sweet as pie and super flighty. But that doesn't stop this unlikely pair from becoming best buds and roomies! Together, they're a power duo with a love for fun and adventure -- it's just too bad that it doesn't come cheap. A booming out-of-home babysitting business quickly becomes the answer to their empty-pocket problems, but also an extra reason for countless wacky adventures to come!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April O'Neil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade realizes being a good dancer in real life is very different to being a good dancer on a computer game. Hope shows her how it's done, meaning she tops a leader board and wins a visit from famous gamer Mr Best for a dance off in person. Jade tries to withdraw, but Mr Best calls her a chicken which makes her determined to beat him! Training with Hope begins, and Jade's ready for battle, but Mr Best doesn't play fair and ends up winning! Disappointed, Jade challenges Mr Best to a real dance battle which she wins. // Jade signs herself and Mica up to hopefully win the "Young Explorers" prize - a holiday for all their friends. Jade has suggested they put on a play that will be judged by Professor Lopez, but Mica has stage fright. The Marsups help with rehearsals, but when show day arrives the twins forget the script, and an essential prop. The Marsupilamis step up to save the day, and an awesome performance is delivered, that impresses Professor Lopez so much that he awards the school the prize.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick gets a stunt double in 'Stuntin', and then in 'Olly Olly Organ Free', Patrick's organs leave his body in protest. ) 18:00 SpongeBob SquarePants It's King Neptune's birthday, and SpongeBob wants to make sure his friends and family are there, including his son, Triton. But Neptune and Triton don't get along... (Subtitled)

Barbapapa - Üks suur perekond
programme.desc: Ei! See pole läbi. Barbabravo pole enam laps, vaid suur poiss.

programme.title: Barbapapa - Üks suur perekond
programme.desc: Barbabrighti ilusad roosid kaovad keset ööd. Barbapapa otsustab lastele rääkida ajast, kui käis Põhja-Jäämerel merepõhja uurimas.

programme.title: Tim Rex kosmoses
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia ja isa jäävad kaugele asteroidile lõksu. Tim, Kai ja Tommy proovivad ema magamistoast palli tagasi saada. Tia uus õhupall jääb puu otsa kinni ja Tim proovib seda alla tuua.

programme.title: Rubble ja meeskond
programme.desc: Kui Kiirusemeister saboteerib linna talendivõistluse lava, peavad kutsad Mootori andega päeva päästma. Sierra Säde tuleb Ehituslahe päevale laulma. Kui bändi pillid katki lähevad, peavad Rubble ja meeskond ehituslahenduse leidma.

programme.title: Rubble ja meeskond
programme.desc: Mis oleks toredam kui üks kutsu ehitusmasinas? Palju kutsusid ehitusmasinates. Rubble ja tema pere - tädi, vanaisa, nõod ja teised - teevad kõvasti tööd, et nende kodulinn, Ehitajatepesa, oleks üks igati v-auhh-va koht, kus elada.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Nüüd saab Doraga veelgi enam avastada. Liitu ikoonilise Avastaja Doraga imelistel seiklustel koos uute ja vanade sõpradega, kui ta seikleb kummalises ja imelises Vihmametsas koos oma parima sõbra Saapaga

programme.title: Leek ja monstermasinad
programme.desc: Leek ja monstermasinad on arvutiga animeeritud interaktiivne sari, mille peaosas on Leek, maailma kõige imelisem Monstermasin, tema juht kaheksa-aastane poiss nimega AJ ning nende seiklused Veosilla linnas. Veosilla linnas ei sära ükski täht eredamalt kui Leek. Ta on võidusõidurajal tšempion ning tänavatel kangelane. Kus on pahandust, seal pöördutakse tema poole, sest kõik teavad, et Leek suudab teha asju, mida teised autod ei suuda. Ta on kiireim monstermasin terves linnas: tal on Leegikiirus. Leek suudab seljatada kõik raskused kasutades oma teaduslikke teadmisi. Kui olukord kipub kitsaks, siis suudab ta muunduda ükskõik missuguseks masinaks ning leida lahenduse parasjagu käesolevale probleemile.

programme.title: Barbapapa - Üks suur perekond
programme.desc: Barbalapsed otsustasid etteaste korraldada ja teevad selleks kõik. Barbalib tahab luua parimat limonaadi.

programme.title: Barbapapa - Üks suur perekond
programme.desc: Barbalapsed avastavad imeliku koopa. Barbalib räägib koopa Barbapapade lugu ja kuidas nad muutusid. Barbalastel on elutoas pidžaamapidu. Nad kardavad kapis olevat koletist, seega nad seavad lõkse, et ta kinni püüda.

programme.title: Tim Rex kosmoses
programme.desc: Tim ja Kai proovivad leida esemeid, mis on randa maetud. Tim viskab vanu asju minema, aga varsti avastab, et kõik pole mõeldud prügikasti. Tim, Tia ja Tommy proovivad vanemaid veenda, et nad võtaks kodulooma.

programme.title: Rubble ja meeskond
programme.desc: Kui rändav loomaarst dr Diwa ei lõpeta Ehituslahes kõiki ülevaatusi õigeks ajaks, teab Rubble ja meeskond, mida teha. Lily merineitsiteemaline sünnipäevapidu jääb vihma tõttu ära. Aeg ehituslahenduseks!

programme.title: Käpapatrull
programme.desc: Käpa-Patrull on eelkooliealiste sari, peaosas grupp kangelaslikke kutsikaid: Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Zuma, Rubble ja Skye, keda juhib 10-aastane tehnikataibuga poiss Ryder. Olles unikaalne segu probleemide lahendamise oskustest, ägedatest sõidukitest ja armsast rohkest kutsahuumorist, teeb Käpa-Patrull koostööd ülitähtsatel päästeoperatsioonidel, et kaitsta Seiklustelahe kogukonda. Tuletõrjekoer Marshallist politseikoer Chase'ini, ja Skye'ni, kes lendab kõrgelt oma helikopteriga, näitavad nad tiimitöö ja hea kodakondsuse tähtsust. Neil kõigil on seljas omaenda eriline Kutsakott, mis aitab neil kõigega toime tulla - kassipoegade aitamisest rongi päästmiseni kalju äärelt! Ja pole vahet kui suur on seiklus, Käpa-Patrullil on alati aega mänguks, naeruks ja üheks kõrvasügamiseks Ryderilt. Lõbus Käpa-Patrulli fakt: Ryder päästis kõik need kutsad ja õpetas neile nende Käpa-Patrulli oskused.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora ja Saabas aitavad Bennyt meistrivõistluste võrkpallimänguks uue liigutusega. Dora ja Saabas kohtuvad draakon Dulcega, kes läheb esimest päeva kooli. Nad näitavad, et kõigi erinevused teevadki nad suurepärasteks.

programme.title: Tim Rex kosmoses
programme.desc: Kui torm hoiab peret kodus, peavad nad välja mõtlema mängu, et aega veeta.

programme.title: Põrsas Peppa
programme.desc: Peppa on armas ja alati rõõmsameelne põrsaplika, kes elab koos oma väikese venna George'i, Emme Põssa ja Issi Põssaga. Peppale meeldib mängida, end põnevalt riidesse panna, väljas käia ja mudalompides hüpata. Ta seiklused lõpevad alati õnnelikult ja suure naeruga.

programme.title: Barbapapa - Üks suur perekond

programme.title: Barbapapa - Üks suur perekond
programme.desc: Kõik magavad rahulikult ja võid mõelda, mida Barbalapsed unes näevad.

programme.title: Hr Krokodill
programme.desc: Hr Krokodill riietub esimesel halloweenil super-krokodilliks ja ta proovib uue isiksusega elada. Daisy ja hr Krokodill lubavad, et hoolitsevad pr Florese auhinnatud taime eest, aga nad lükkavad seda kogu aeg edasi.
